---
title: "zra"
author: "Erin Hassett"
date: "2025-08-26"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

#READ ME
```{r}
#data comes from turning on and off the unlimited and limited microbes in ecosys. 
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
```
#Make dataframes
##limited
```{r}
#cove only data
getwd()
setwd("C:/Erin/ecosys/Cove")

lim<-read.delim("microbe.lim.12.14.txt", header = TRUE) 

#limited microbes
lim2 <- tail(lim, -17217)
names(lim2)[1] <- "testing"
max_cols <- max(sapply(strsplit(lim2$testing, " "), length))
lim3 <- lim2 %>% 
        separate(testing, into = paste0("V", 1:17), sep = "\\s+", fill = "right")
lim3 <- lim3 %>% filter(V1 != "NOW")
lim3 <- lim3 %>% filter(V2 != "SPLIT")
lim3 <- lim3 %>% select(-1)

colnames(lim3)
names(lim3)[1] <- "Year"
lim3$Year<-as.numeric(lim3$Year)
names(lim3)[2] <- "DOY"
lim3$DOY <-as.numeric(lim3$DOY)
names(lim3)[3] <- "HOUR"
lim3$HOUR <-as.numeric(lim3$HOUR)
names(lim3)[4] <- "GridCell"
lim3$GridCell <-as.factor(lim3$GridCell)
names(lim3)[5] <- "Soil"
lim3$Soil <-as.factor(lim3$Soil)
names(lim3)[6] <- "OB_AERO"
lim3$OB_AERO <-as.numeric(lim3$OB_AERO)
names(lim3)[7] <- "FAC_AN"
lim3$FAC_AN <-as.numeric(lim3$FAC_AN)
names(lim3)[8] <- "FUNGI"
lim3$FUNGI <-as.numeric(lim3$FUNGI)
names(lim3)[9] <- "N2FIX"
lim3$N2FIX <-as.numeric(lim3$N2FIX)
names(lim3)[10] <- "NH3OX"
lim3$NH3OX <-as.numeric(lim3$NH3OX)
names(lim3)[11] <- "NO2OX"
lim3$NO2OX <-as.numeric(lim3$NO2OX)
names(lim3)[12] <- "CH4OX"
lim3$CH4OX <-as.numeric(lim3$CH4OX)
names(lim3)[13] <- "ACEN2"
lim3$ACEN2 <-as.numeric(lim3$ACEN2)
names(lim3)[14] <- "ACEFEM"
lim3$ACEFEM <-as.numeric(lim3$ACEFEM)
names(lim3)[15] <- "ACEMET"
lim3$ACEMET <-as.numeric(lim3$ACEMET)
names(lim3)[16] <- "H2MET"
lim3$H2MET <-as.numeric(lim3$H2MET)
table(lim3$H2MET)

lim3$SoilWidth <- lim3$Soil
mapping <- setNames(
  c(0.01, 0.015, 0.02, 0.04), 
  c(1, 6, 9, 10))
lim3$SoilWidth <- mapping[as.character(lim3$Soil)]

# Define microbial columns
microbial_cols <- c("OB_AERO", "FAC_AN", "FUNGI", "N2FIX", 
                    "NH3OX", "NO2OX", "CH4OX", "ACEN2", 
                    "ACEFEM", "ACEMET", "H2MET")
lim4 <-lim3
# Normalize microbial values by soil width
lim4[microbial_cols] <- lapply(microbial_cols, function(col) lim4[[col]] / lim4$SoilWidth)

#lim3$SUM <-rowSums(lim3[, 6:16], na.rm = TRUE)
```
##unlimited
```{r}
unlim<-read.delim("microbe.unlim.12.13.txt", header = TRUE)
unlim2 <- tail(unlim, -17217)
names(unlim2)[1] <- "testing"
max_cols <- max(sapply(strsplit(unlim2$testing, " "), length))
unlim3 <- unlim2 %>% 
        separate(testing, into = paste0("V", 1:17), sep = "\\s+", fill = "right")
unlim3 <- unlim3 %>% filter(V1 != "NOW")
unlim3 <- unlim3 %>% filter(V2 != "SPLIT")
unlim3 <- unlim3 %>% select(-1)

colnames(unlim3)
names(unlim3)[1] <- "Year"
unlim3$Year<-as.numeric(unlim3$Year)
names(unlim3)[2] <- "DOY"
unlim3$DOY <-as.numeric(unlim3$DOY)
names(unlim3)[3] <- "HOUR"
unlim3$HOUR <-as.numeric(unlim3$HOUR)
names(unlim3)[4] <- "GridCell"
unlim3$GridCell <-as.factor(unlim3$GridCell)
names(unlim3)[5] <- "Soil"
unlim3$Soil <-as.factor(unlim3$Soil)
names(unlim3)[6] <- "OB_AERO"
unlim3$OB_AERO <-as.numeric(unlim3$OB_AERO)
names(unlim3)[7] <- "FAC_AN"
unlim3$FAC_AN <-as.numeric(unlim3$FAC_AN)
names(unlim3)[8] <- "FUNGI"
unlim3$FUNGI <-as.numeric(unlim3$FUNGI)
names(unlim3)[9] <- "N2FIX"
unlim3$N2FIX <-as.numeric(unlim3$N2FIX)
names(unlim3)[10] <- "NH3OX"
unlim3$NH3OX <-as.numeric(unlim3$NH3OX)
names(unlim3)[11] <- "NO2OX"
unlim3$NO2OX <-as.numeric(unlim3$NO2OX)
names(unlim3)[12] <- "CH4OX"
unlim3$CH4OX <-as.numeric(unlim3$CH4OX)
names(unlim3)[13] <- "ACEN2"
unlim3$ACEN2 <-as.numeric(unlim3$ACEN2)
names(unlim3)[14] <- "ACEFEM"
unlim3$ACEFEM <-as.numeric(unlim3$ACEFEM)
names(unlim3)[15] <- "ACEMET"
unlim3$ACEMET <-as.numeric(unlim3$ACEMET)
names(unlim3)[16] <- "H2MET"
unlim3$H2MET <-as.numeric(unlim3$H2MET)
table(unlim3$H2MET)

unlim3$SoilWidth <- unlim3$Soil
mapping <- setNames(
  c(0.01, 0.015, 0.02, 0.04), 
  c(1, 6, 9, 10))
unlim3$SoilWidth <- mapping[as.character(unlim3$Soil)]

unlim4 <-unlim3
# Normalize microbial values by soil width
unlim4[microbial_cols] <- lapply(microbial_cols, function(col) unlim4[[col]] / unlim4$SoilWidth)


unlim4 <- unlim4 %>%
  mutate(
    sum_6_16 = rowSums(across(6:16), na.rm = TRUE),
    perc_ace     = .[[15]] / sum_6_16,
    perc_hydr   = .[[16]] / sum_6_16,
    perc_methox = .[[12]] / sum_6_16
  ) %>%
  select(-sum_6_16)

#write.csv(lim3, "C:/Erin/ecosys/Cove/microbes_LIMIT.csv")
#write.csv(unlim3, "C:/Erin/ecosys/Cove/microbes_UNLIMIT.csv")
```
##difference
```{r}
#unmet e- demand! These microbes are unsatisfied. 
full_microbes <- full_join(
  unlim4, 
  lim4, 
  by = c("Year", "DOY", "HOUR", "GridCell","Soil"), 
  suffix = c("_U", "_L"))

#subttract unlimited from limited to get stressed microbes
full_microbes$OB_AERO = (full_microbes$OB_AERO_U-full_microbes$OB_AERO_L)
full_microbes$FAC_AN = (full_microbes$FAC_AN_U-full_microbes$FAC_AN_U)
full_microbes$FUNGI = (full_microbes$FUNGI_U-full_microbes$FUNGI_L)
full_microbes$N2FIX = (full_microbes$N2FIX_U-full_microbes$N2FIX_L)
full_microbes$NH3OX = (full_microbes$NH3OX_U-full_microbes$NH3OX_L)
full_microbes$NO2OX = (full_microbes$NO2OX_U-full_microbes$NO2OX_L)
full_microbes$CH4OX = (full_microbes$CH4OX_U-full_microbes$CH4OX_L)
full_microbes$ACEN2 = (full_microbes$ACEN2_U-full_microbes$ACEN2_L)
full_microbes$ACEFEM = (full_microbes$ACEFEM_U-full_microbes$ACEFEM_L)
full_microbes$ACEMET = (full_microbes$ACEMET_U-full_microbes$ACEMET_L)
full_microbes$H2MET = (full_microbes$H2MET_U-full_microbes$H2MET_L)

#calculatng the percent reduced
full_microbes$OB_AERO_red = ((full_microbes$OB_AERO/full_microbes$OB_AERO_U)*100)
full_microbes$FAC_AN_red = ((full_microbes$FAC_AN/full_microbes$FAC_AN_U)*100)
full_microbes$FUNGI_red = ((full_microbes$FUNGI/full_microbes$FUNGI_U)*100)
full_microbes$N2FIX_red = ((full_microbes$N2FIX/full_microbes$N2FIX_U)*100)
full_microbes$NH3OX_red = ((full_microbes$NH3OX/full_microbes$NH3OX_U)*100)
full_microbes$NO2OX_red = ((full_microbes$NO2OX/full_microbes$NO2OX_U)*100)
full_microbes$CH4OX_red = ((full_microbes$CH4OX/full_microbes$CH4OX_U)*100)
full_microbes$ACEN2_red = ((full_microbes$ACEN2/full_microbes$ACEN2_U)*100)
full_microbes$ACEFEM_red = ((full_microbes$ACEFEM/full_microbes$ACEFEM_U)*100)
full_microbes$ACEMET_red = ((full_microbes$ACEMET/full_microbes$ACEMET_U)*100)
full_microbes$H2MET_red = ((full_microbes$H2MET/full_microbes$H2MET_U)*100)

microbes_reduced <- full_microbes [,-c(6:43)]

#cut out U and L only columns, retain just the difference
microbes <- full_microbes [,-c(6:31)]
str(microbes)

microbes <- microbes %>%
  mutate(
    Date = as.Date(DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Year, "-01-01")),
    Datetime = Date + hours(HOUR - 1)  # adjust if HOUR is 1–24
  )
```
#OPEN plots (full 2023, no ZRA)
##unlimited
```{r}
Soil1_open_U<-unlim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="1" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET),
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil1_open_U$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil1_open_U$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil1_open_U$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil1_open_U$HOUR - 1)

Soil1_open_U2 <- Soil1_open_U %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, time_hour)
df1_long_U <- Soil1_open_U %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")
df1_long_U2 <- Soil1_open_U2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

U1<-ggplot(df1_long_U2, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.01 m (TEA-unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
    scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))


# SOIL LAYER 6___________________________________________
Soil6_open_U<-unlim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="6" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET),
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil6_open_U$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil6_open_U$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil6_open_U$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil6_open_U$HOUR - 1)

Soil6_open_U2 <- Soil6_open_U %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, time_hour)

df6_long_U <- Soil6_open_U %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df6_long_U2 <- Soil6_open_U2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

U6<-ggplot(df6_long_U2, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.08 m (TEA-unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #legend.position = "bottom",
    #legend.box = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank())+
  # Change legend item names using scale_color_manual
  scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))
  #  axis.title.y= element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


# SOIL LAYER 9___________________________________________
Soil9_open_U<-unlim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="9" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil9_open_U$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil9_open_U$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil6_open_U$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil9_open_U$HOUR - 1)
Soil9_open_U2 <- Soil9_open_U %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, time_hour)

df9_long_U <- Soil9_open_U %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df9_long_U2 <- Soil9_open_U2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

U9<-ggplot(df9_long_U2, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.15 m (TEA-unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
   # legend.position = "bottom",
  #  legend.box = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
    scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))
 # guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

# SOIL LAYER 10
U10<-Soil10_open_U<-unlim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="10" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil10_open_U$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil10_open_U$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil10_open_U$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil10_open_U$HOUR - 1)

Soil10_open_U2 <- Soil10_open_U %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, time_hour)

df10_long_U <- Soil10_open_U %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df10_long_U2 <- Soil10_open_U2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

U10<-ggplot(df10_long_U2, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.2 m (TEA-unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
 theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  #  legend.position = "bottom",
  #  legend.box = "horizontal",
    #axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    #axis.text.x=element_blank())
    #axis.title.y= element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
  scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))

U10b<-ggplot(df10_long_U, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = "0.2 m (TEA-Unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
 theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme(
   # legend.position = "bottom",
  #  legend.box = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) 
#  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

#ggarrange(U1,U6,U9,U10, common.legend = TRUE)
```

##difference
```{r}
Soil1_open_D<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="1" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil1_open_D$datetime <- as.Date(Soil1_open_D$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil1_open_D$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil1_open_D$HOUR - 1)
Soil1_open_D2 <- Soil1_open_D %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, datetime)

df1_long_D2 <- Soil1_open_D2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

D1<-ggplot(df1_long_D2, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
   # ylim(0,2.5)+
  labs(title = "0.01 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
 theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))+
  scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))

# SOIL LAYER 6___________________________________________
Soil6_open_D<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="6" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil6_open_D$datetime <- as.Date(Soil6_open_D$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil6_open_D$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil6_open_D$HOUR - 1)

Soil6_open_D2 <- Soil6_open_D %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, datetime)

df6_long_D <- Soil6_open_D %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df6_long_D2 <- Soil6_open_D2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

D6<-ggplot(df6_long_D2, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.08 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
   theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #legend.position = "bottom",
    #legend.box = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x=element_blank(), 
    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank()) +
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))+
    scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))

# SOIL LAYER 9___________________________________________
Soil9_open_D<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="9" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil9_open_D$datetime <- as.Date(Soil9_open_D$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil9_open_D$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil9_open_D$HOUR - 1)

Soil9_open_D2 <- Soil9_open_D %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, datetime)

df9_long_D <- Soil9_open_D %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df9_long_D2 <- Soil9_open_D2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

D9<-ggplot(df9_long_D2, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.15 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
    scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))

  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
# SOIL LAYER 10
Soil10_open_D<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="10" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil10_open_D$datetime <- as.Date(Soil10_open_D$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil10_open_D$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil10_open_D$HOUR - 1)

Soil10_open_D2 <- Soil10_open_D %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, datetime)

df10_long_D <- Soil10_open_D %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df10_long_D2 <- Soil10_open_D2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

D10<-ggplot(df10_long_D2, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.2 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    #axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank()) +
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
  scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))

```
##percent reduced
```{r}
Soil1_open_R<-microbes_reduced %>%
  filter(Soil=="1" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO_red, FAC_AN_red, FUNGI_red, N2FIX_red,NH3OX_red,NO2OX_red, CH4OX_red, ACEN2_red, ACEFEM_red, ACEMET_red, H2MET_red ), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
#View(Soil1_open_R2)
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil1_open_R$datetime <- as.Date(Soil1_open_R$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil1_open_R$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil1_open_R$HOUR - 1)

Soil1_open_R2 <- Soil1_open_R %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX_red,ACEMET_red,H2MET_red, datetime)

df1_long_R2 <- Soil1_open_R2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

R1<-ggplot(df1_long_R2, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
   # ylim(0,2.5)+
  labs(title = "0.01 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
 theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))+
  scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))

# SOIL LAYER 6___________________________________________
Soil6_open_R<-microbes_reduced %>%
  filter(Soil=="6" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO_red, FAC_AN_red, FUNGI_red,
                     N2FIX_red,NH3OX_red, NO2OX_red,
                     CH4OX_red, ACEN2_red, ACEFEM_red,
                     ACEMET_red, H2MET_red ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil6_open_R$datetime <- as.Date(Soil6_open_R$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil6_open_R$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil6_open_R$HOUR - 1)

Soil6_open_R2 <- Soil6_open_R %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX_red,ACEMET_red,H2MET_red, datetime)

#df6_long_R <- Soil6_open_R %>%
#  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df6_long_R2 <- Soil6_open_R2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

View(Soil10_open_R2)

R6<-ggplot(df6_long_R2, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.08 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
   theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #legend.position = "bottom",
    #legend.box = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x=element_blank(), 
    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank()) +
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))+
    scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))

# SOIL LAYER 9___________________________________________
Soil9_open_R<-microbes_reduced %>%
  filter(Soil=="9" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO_red, FAC_AN_red, FUNGI_red, N2FIX_red,NH3OX_red, 
                     NO2OX_red, CH4OX_red, ACEN2_red, ACEFEM_red, ACEMET_red,
                     H2MET_red), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil9_open_R$datetime <- as.Date(Soil9_open_R$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil9_open_R$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil9_open_R$HOUR - 1)

Soil9_open_R2 <- Soil9_open_R %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX_red,ACEMET_red,H2MET_red, datetime)

#df9_long_R2 <- Soil9_open_R2 %>%
#  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df9_long_R2 <- Soil9_open_R2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

R9<-ggplot(df9_long_R2, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  #ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.15 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
    scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))

  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
# SOIL LAYER 10
Soil10_open_R<-microbes_reduced %>%
  filter(Soil=="10" & GridCell=="3")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO_red, FAC_AN_red, FUNGI_red, N2FIX_red,NH3OX_red, 
                     NO2OX_red, CH4OX_red, ACEN2_red, ACEFEM_red, ACEMET_red,
                     H2MET_red), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil10_open_R$datetime <- as.Date(Soil10_open_R$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil10_open_R$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil10_open_R$HOUR - 1)

Soil10_open_R2 <- Soil10_open_R %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX_red,ACEMET_red,H2MET_red, datetime)

#df10_long_R2 <- Soil10_open_R2 %>%
#  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df10_long_R2 <- Soil10_open_R2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

R10<-ggplot(df10_long_R2, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  #ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.2 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    #axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank()) +
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
  scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Microbial Functional Type",   # ← this changes the legend title
  labels = c("Acetoclastic methanogens", "Methane oxidizers", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogens"),
  values = c("ACEMET" = "skyblue",
             "CH4OX" = "seagreen",
             "H2MET" = "chocolate2"))
```

#Figure 5 
```{r}
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
#ggarrange(D1,D6,D9,D10, common.legend = TRUE)
#plot1<-ggarrange(U1,L1,D1, common.legend = TRUE, nrow=3)
#plot6<-ggarrange(U6,L6,D6, common.legend = TRUE, nrow=3)
#plot9<-ggarrange(U9,L9,D9, common.legend = TRUE, nrow=3)
#plot10<-ggarrange(U10,L10,D10, common.legend = TRUE, nrow=3)

#Figure 5
allplots<-ggarrange(U1,D1,U6,D6, U9,  D9,U10, D10,  common.legend=TRUE,legend="right", nrow=4,ncol=2, labels ="AUTO")

```
#e-acceptor full year
##no3
```{r}
#output from Tim's updated source code
no3 <- read.delim("NO3.12.16.txt", header = TRUE, sep = ",", dec = ".")
no3 <- tail(no3, -17265)
names(no3)[1] <- "testing"
max_cols <- max(sapply(strsplit(no3$testing, " "), length))
no3b <- no3 %>% 
        separate(testing, into = paste0("V", 1:9), sep = "\\s+", fill = "right")
no3b <- no3b %>% filter(V1 != "NOW")
no3b <- no3b %>% filter(V1 != "CONVERGENCE")
no3b <- no3b %>% filter(V2 != "SPLIT")
no3b <- no3b %>% select(-1)

colnames(no3b)
names(no3b)[1] <- "NO3.YYYY"
names(no3b)[2] <- "DOY"
names(no3b)[3] <- "Hour"
names(no3b)[4] <- "Gridcell" #only #3
names(no3b)[5] <- "NY" #always 1
names(no3b)[6] <- "L"
names(no3b)[7] <- "ZNO3S"
names(no3b)[8] <- "Bulk"
no3b$ZNO3S <-as.numeric(no3b$ZNO3S)
#names(no3b)[9] <- "CNO3"
#no3b$CNO3 <-as.numeric(no3b$CNO3)
#names(no3b)[10] <- "CNO3S"
#no3b$CNO3S <-as.numeric(no3b$CNO3S)

#CNO3S= total concentrations in non-band (g/m3)
#ZNO3S =total No3 in non-band zones (divided by volumne)= grams of N

no3b$Year <- 2023
no3b$DOY <-as.numeric(no3b$DOY)
no3b$Hour <-as.numeric(no3b$Hour)
no3b <- no3b %>%
   mutate(
    time_hour = ymd(paste0(Year, "-01-01")) + days(DOY - 1) + hours(Hour))

no3_1<- no3b %>% 
  filter(L ==1) %>% 
  group_by(time_hour) %>%
  summarise(
    ZNO3S1 = mean(ZNO3S, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
no3_6<- no3b %>% 
  filter(L ==6)%>% 
  group_by(time_hour) %>%
  summarise(
    ZNO3S6 = mean(ZNO3S, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
no3_9<- no3b %>% filter(L ==9)%>% 
  group_by(time_hour) %>%
  summarise(
    ZNO3S9 = mean(ZNO3S, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
no3_10<- no3b %>% filter(L ==10)%>% 
  group_by(time_hour) %>%
  summarise(
    ZNO3S10 = mean(ZNO3S, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

plot(no3_1$ZNO3S1, main = "No3, Layer 1")
plot(no3_6$ZNO3S6, main = "No3, Layer 6")
plot(no3_9$ZNO3S9, main = "No3, Layer 9")
plot(no3_10$ZNO3S10, main = "No3, Layer 10")

#The Full Year NO3
ggplot(no3b, aes(x =time_hour , y = ZNO3S, color = factor(L))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("1" = "blue", "6" = "red", "9" = "green", "10" = "purple"),
    name = "Depth") +
  labs(
    x = "Time",
    y = expression(NO[3]~""~"(" * mg~L^-1 * ")"),
    title = "Nitrate at Different Depths") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

```
##O2 and water
```{r}
oxygen<-read.delim("030102023hc", header = TRUE, sep = "", dec = ".")
oxygen$DATE <-as.numeric(oxygen$DATE)
oxygen$DATE <- dmy(oxygen$DATE)
oxygen <- oxygen %>%
  mutate(time_hour = DATE + hours(HOUR - 1))

waterb<-read.delim("level_2023", header = FALSE, sep = ",", dec = ".")
water<-read.csv("level_2023c.csv", header = FALSE, sep = ",", dec = ".")

water$time_hour <-oxygen$time_hour

water_p <- ggplot(water, aes(x = time_hour, y = V3, fill = V3)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="2023 Water Level",y="Level (m)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

oxygen_1 <- ggplot(oxygen, aes(x = DOY, y = O2_1)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title="2023 Oxygen Concentration | Soil-Water interface", 
       y = expression(O[2]~Concentration~(g~m^{-3})))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))


oxygen_6 <- ggplot(oxygen, aes(x = DOY, y = O2_6)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="2023 Oxygen Concentration | 0.08 m", 
       y = expression(O[2]~Concentration~(g~m^{-3})))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

oxygen_9 <- ggplot(oxygen, aes(x = DOY, y = O2_9)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="2023 Oxygen Concentration | 0.15 m", 
       y = expression(O[2]~Concentration~(g~m^{-3})))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

oxygen_10 <- ggplot(oxygen, aes(x = DOY, y = O2_10)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="2023 Oxygen Concentration | 0.2 m", 
       y = expression(O[2]~Concentration~(g~m^{-3})))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(#axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        #axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
```
#ZRA, e-, ecosys
```{r}
library(scales)

#need to compare the field data (ZRA data) to the ecosys data with the ZRA layers. 
ZRA_df<- read.csv("summer2023.csv")
ZRA_df$pair <-as.factor(ZRA_df$pair)
ZRA_df$time<- mdy_hm(ZRA_df$time)
ZRA_df <- ZRA_df %>%
  mutate(time_hour = floor_date(time, unit = "hour"))

merged_ZRA <- ZRA_df %>%
  left_join(oxygen %>% select(time_hour, O2_1, O2_6, O2_9, O2_10),by = "time_hour") %>%
  left_join(water %>% select(time_hour, water=V3),by = "time_hour")%>%
  left_join(no3_1 %>% select(time_hour, ZNO3S1=ZNO3S1),by = "time_hour")%>%
  left_join(no3_6 %>% select(time_hour, ZNO3S6=ZNO3S6),by = "time_hour")%>%
  left_join(no3_9 %>% select(time_hour, ZNO3S9=ZNO3S9),by = "time_hour")%>%
   left_join(no3_10 %>% select(time_hour, ZNO3S10=ZNO3S10),by = "time_hour")

ZRA_1<-merged_ZRA %>%
  filter(pair=="2 to 4")%>%
  mutate(HOUR= hour(time),
         DOY = yday(time))

ZRA_6<-merged_ZRA %>%
  filter(pair=="2 to 78.2")%>%
  mutate(HOUR= hour(time),
         DOY = yday(time))

ZRA_9<-merged_ZRA %>%
    filter(pair=="2 to 154.4")%>%
  mutate(HOUR= hour(time),
         DOY = yday(time))

ZRA_10<-merged_ZRA %>%
    filter(pair=="2 to 228.6")%>%
  mutate(HOUR= hour(time),
         DOY = yday(time))
#plot(ZRA_short$time,ZRA_short$potential, type="l")

```
##current ~ water
```{r}
na_water <- lm(potential ~ water, data = ZRA_10)
summary(na_water)
m  <- coef(na_water)[2]  # slope
b  <- coef(na_water)[1]  # intercept
r2 <- summary(na_water)$r.squared

na_water10<-ggplot(ZRA_10, aes(x=water, y=potential)) +
 geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE,color = "black")+
 # ylim(2.5,5.5)+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(x = "Water (mg/L)",
      y = "ZRA Current (nA)")+
  annotate("text", 
        x = 0.6, y = 2200, hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5,
        label = paste0("Slope = ", round(m, 2),
                       "\nY-int = ", round(b, 2),
                          "\nR² = ", round(r2, 2)))

#ggarrange(na_water1,na_water6,na_water9,na_water10, nrow=4, ncol=1, labels="AUTO")
```
##Difference+ZRA
###group by
```{r}
#this uses only the DIFFERENCE (unlimited- limited microbial activity)! 
short1<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil == "1", GridCell %in% c("2", "3")) %>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil) %>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX, NH3OX, NO2OX, 
                     CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET),
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop")

short6<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="6" & GridCell %in% c("2", "3"))%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX,NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ),
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()

short9<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="9" & GridCell %in% c("2", "3"))%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX,NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ),  ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()

short10<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="10" & GridCell %in% c("2", "3"))%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()

# merge two dataframes together (ecosys and chelsea's data)
complete1<-merge(x = short1, y = ZRA_1, by=c("DOY","HOUR"))
complete6<-merge(x = short6, y = ZRA_6, by=c("DOY","HOUR"))
complete9<-merge(x = short9, y = ZRA_9, by=c("DOY","HOUR"))
complete10<-merge(x = short10, y = ZRA_10, by=c("DOY","HOUR"))

#pivot longer to make stacked plots
microbe_long1 <- complete1 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")
microbe_long6 <- complete6 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")
microbe_long9 <- complete9 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")
microbe_long10 <- complete10 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

```
###merging e- acceptors
```{r}
# Pivot longer
oxygen_long <- complete1 %>%
  filter(GridCell=="2")%>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(O2_6, O2_9, O2_10),
               names_to = "O2_Depth",
               values_to = "O2_value")
oxygen_long <- oxygen_long %>%
  mutate(
    O2_Depth = recode(O2_Depth,
                   "O2_10"  = "Layer 10",
                   "O2_6"  = "Layer 6",
                   "O2_9"  = "Layer 9"),
    O2_Depth = factor(O2_Depth, levels = c("Layer 6", "Layer 9", "Layer 10")))

O2_all<-ggplot(oxygen_long, aes(x = time, y = O2_value, color="O2_Depth")) +
  geom_line(size=1) +
  #geom_jitter()+
  labs(y = expression(O[2]~""~"(" * mg~L^-1 * ")")) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

#ggarrange(water_p, oxygen_6, oxygen_9, oxygen_10, nrow=4, align = "h", common.legend = FALSE)

# Pivot longer
No3_long <- complete1 %>%
    filter(GridCell=="3")%>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ZNO3S1, ZNO3S6, ZNO3S9,ZNO3S10),
               names_to = "NO3_Depth",
               values_to = "NO3_value")
No3_long$NO3_Depth <-as.factor(No3_long$NO3_Depth )
levels(No3_long$NO3_Depth )

No3_long <- No3_long %>%
  mutate(
    NO3_Depth = recode(NO3_Depth,
                   "ZNO3S1"  = "Layer 1",
                   "ZNO3S6"  = "Layer 6",
                   "ZNO3S9"  = "Layer 9",
                   "ZNO3S10" = "Layer 10"),
    NO3_Depth = factor(NO3_Depth, levels = c("Layer 1", "Layer 6", "Layer 9", "Layer 10"))
  )

NO3_all<-ggplot(No3_long, aes(x = time_hour, y = NO3_value, color = NO3_Depth)) +
  geom_line(size=1) +
  geom_jitter()+
  labs(y = expression(N~""~"(" * mg~L^-1 * ")"),
       color= "Depth") +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

```
#Line graphs
##Make datetime
```{r}
#create datetime= same HOUR for ZRA
microbe_long1 <- microbe_long1 %>%
  mutate(
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(Year, DOY, HOUR),
                          format = "%Y %j %H"))

microbe_long6 <- microbe_long6 %>%
  mutate(
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(Year, DOY, HOUR),
                          format = "%Y %j %H"))

microbe_long9 <- microbe_long9 %>%
  mutate(
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(Year, DOY, HOUR),
                          format = "%Y %j %H"))

microbe_long10 <- microbe_long10 %>%
  mutate(
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(Year, DOY, HOUR),
                          format = "%Y %j %H"))
```
##scaling
```{r}
overlap_factor <- 4  # Adjust this value until lines overlap properly

#define a scaling factor so both variables fit visually
#scale_factor1 <- max(microbe_long1$Value, na.rm = TRUE) /max(microbe_long1$potential, na.rm = TRUE)

#scale_factor6 <- max(microbe_long6$Value, na.rm = TRUE) /max(microbe_long6$potential, na.rm = TRUE)

#scale_factor9 <- max(microbe_long9$Value, na.rm = TRUE) /max(microbe_long9$potential, na.rm = TRUE)


#scale_factor10 <- max(microbe_long10$Value, na.rm = TRUE) /max(microbe_long10$potential, na.rm = TRUE)

```
##Line graphs
```{r}
# Sum across microbes at each datetime
#Layer 1
microbe_sum1 <- microbe_long1 %>%
  group_by(GridCell, datetime) %>%
  summarise(
    total_microbes = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    potential = mean(potential, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

scale_factor1 <- diff(range(microbe_sum1$total_microbes, na.rm = TRUE)) /diff(range(microbe_sum1$potential, na.rm = TRUE))
scale_factor1_adjusted <- scale_factor1 * overlap_factor

line1 <- ggplot(microbe_sum1, aes(x = datetime)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_microbes, color = GridCell),linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = potential * scale_factor1, color = "ZRA Data"),linewidth = 0.7)+
  labs(y = expression(g~C~soil~h^{-1}))+
  scale_y_continuous(
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor1, name = "Current (nA)")) +
scale_color_manual(
  name = "Grid Cell",
  values = c(
    "2" = "darkgreen",
    "3" = "darkorange3",
    "ZRA Data" = "black"),
  labels = c(
   "2" = "Model: Plant grid cell",
    "3" = "Model: Open water grid cell",
    "ZRA Data" = "Observed: ZRA Data"))+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14, family = "serif"),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
       # axis.text.y.right = element_blank(),
       # axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
        legend.title=element_blank())


#LAYER 6
microbe_sum6 <- microbe_long6 %>%
  group_by(GridCell, datetime) %>%
  summarise(total_microbes = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
            potential = mean(potential, na.rm = TRUE))
scale_factor6 <- diff(range(microbe_sum6$total_microbes, na.rm = TRUE)) / diff(range(microbe_sum6$potential, na.rm = TRUE))
scale_factor6_adjusted <- scale_factor6 * overlap_factor

line6<-ggplot(microbe_sum6, aes(x = datetime)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_microbes, color = GridCell),linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = potential * scale_factor6, color = "ZRA Data"),linewidth = 0.7) +
    labs(y = expression(g~C~soil~h^{-1}))+
scale_y_continuous(
   sec.axis = sec_axis(~ ./scale_factor6, name = "Current (nA)"))+
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(
  name = "Grid Cell",
  values = c(
    "2" = "darkgreen",
    "3" = "darkorange3",
    "ZRA Data" = "black"),
  labels = c(
   "2" = "Model: Plant grid cell",
    "3" = "Model: Open water grid cell",
    "ZRA Data" = "Observed: ZRA Data"))+
 theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
       # axis.text.y.right = element_blank(),
       # axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
    legend.title=element_blank())+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


microbe_sum9 <- microbe_long9 %>%
  group_by(GridCell, datetime) %>%
  summarise(total_microbes = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
            potential = mean(potential, na.rm = TRUE))
scale_factor9 <- diff(range(microbe_sum9$total_microbes, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                 diff(range(microbe_sum9$potential, na.rm = TRUE))
scale_factor9_adjusted <- scale_factor9 * overlap_factor

line9<-ggplot(microbe_sum9, aes(x = datetime)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_microbes, color = GridCell),linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = potential * scale_factor9, color = "ZRA Data"),linewidth = 0.7) +
    labs(y = expression(g~C~soil~h^{-1}))+
scale_y_continuous(
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor9, name = "Current (nA)"))+
   scale_color_manual(
  name = "Grid Cell",
  values = c(
    "2" = "darkgreen",
    "3" = "darkorange3",
    "ZRA Data" = "black"),
  labels = c(
   "2" = "Model: Plant grid cell",
    "3" = "Model: Open water grid cell",
    "ZRA Data" = "Observed: ZRA Data"))+
 theme_minimal() +
 theme_bw()+
 theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank())+
      #  axis.text.y.right = element_blank())+
       # axis.title.y.right = element_blank())+
    guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

microbe_sum10 <- microbe_long10 %>%
  group_by(GridCell, datetime) %>%
  summarise(total_microbes = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
            potential = mean(potential, na.rm = TRUE))
scale_factor10 <- diff(range(microbe_sum10$total_microbes, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                 diff(range(microbe_sum10$potential, na.rm = TRUE))
scale_factor10_adjusted <- scale_factor10 * overlap_factor

line10<-ggplot(microbe_sum10, aes(x = datetime)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_microbes, 
                color =  GridCell),linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = potential * scale_factor10, color = "ZRA Data"),linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(y = expression(g~C~soil~h^{-1}))+
 scale_y_continuous(
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor10, name = "Current (nA)"))+
    scale_color_manual(
  name = "Grid Cell",
  values = c(
    "2" = "darkgreen",
    "3" = "darkorange3",
    "ZRA Data" = "black"),
  labels = c(
   "2" = "Model: Plant grid cell",
    "3" = "Model: Open water grid cell",
    "ZRA Data" = "Observed: ZRA Data"))+
  theme_minimal() +
 theme_bw()+
theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank())+
        #axis.text.y.right = element_blank(),
       # axis.title.y.right = element_blank())+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
```
#Figure 6 Plot
```{r}
line_final_D<-ggarrange(line1,line6,line9,line10, nrow=4,ncol=1, align="hv", labels="AUTO", common.legend=TRUE, legend="right")
#line_final_Db<- annotate_figure(line_final_D)
                               #top = text_grob("Difference | model vs ZRA",color = "black", face = "bold", size = 16))
```
#Table 2 R2, RMSE, P
```{r}
library(Metrics)
microbe_sum10_p <-microbe_sum10 %>%
  filter(GridCell==2)
microbe_sum10_o <-microbe_sum10 %>%
  filter(GridCell==3)
colnames(microbe_sum10_p)

microbe_sum9_p <-microbe_sum9 %>%
  filter(GridCell==2)
microbe_sum9_o <-microbe_sum9 %>%
  filter(GridCell==3)

microbe_sum6_p <-microbe_sum6 %>%
  filter(GridCell==2)
microbe_sum6_o <-microbe_sum6 %>%
  filter(GridCell==3)

microbe_sum1_p <-microbe_sum1 %>%
  filter(GridCell==2)
microbe_sum1_o <-microbe_sum1 %>%
  filter(GridCell==3)


fit_plant10 <- lm(potential ~ total_microbes, microbe_sum10_p)
summary(fit_plant10)
fit_open10  <- lm(potential ~ total_microbes, microbe_sum10_o)
summary(fit_open10)

fit_plant9 <- lm(potential ~ total_microbes, microbe_sum9_p)
summary(fit_plant9)
fit_open9  <- lm(potential ~ total_microbes, microbe_sum9_o)
summary(fit_open9)

fit_plant6 <- lm(potential ~ total_microbes, microbe_sum6_p)
summary(fit_plant6)
fit_open6  <- lm(potential ~ total_microbes, microbe_sum6_o)
summary(fit_open6)

fit_plant1 <- lm(potential ~ total_microbes, microbe_sum1_p)
summary(fit_plant1)
fit_open1  <- lm(potential ~ total_microbes, microbe_sum1_o)
summary(fit_open1)

summary(fit_plant1)$r.squared
summary(fit_open1)$r.squared
rmse_1p <- rmse(microbe_sum1_p$potential,
                predict(fit_plant1))
rmse_1o <- rmse(microbe_sum1_o$potential,
                predict(fit_open1))

#rmse_1p <- rmse(microbe_sum1_p$potential, microbe_sum1_p$total_microbes)
#rmse_1o <- rmse(microbe_sum1_o$potential, microbe_sum1_o$total_microbes)

summary(fit_plant6)$r.squared
summary(fit_open6)$r.squared
rmse_6p <- rmse(microbe_sum6_p$potential,
                predict(fit_plant6))
rmse_6o <- rmse(microbe_sum6_o$potential,
                predict(fit_open6))


summary(fit_plant9)$r.squared
summary(fit_open9)$r.squared
rmse_9p <- rmse(microbe_sum9_p$potential,
                predict(fit_plant9))

rmse_9o <- rmse(microbe_sum9_o$potential,
                predict(fit_open9))

summary(fit_plant10)$r.squared
summary(fit_open10)$r.squared
rmse_10p <- rmse(microbe_sum10_p$potential,
                predict(fit_plant10))

rmse_10o <- rmse(microbe_sum10_o$potential,
                predict(fit_open10))
```
#activity~water
```{r}
microbe_sum1_p$time_hour <-microbe_sum1_p$datetime
microbe_sum1_o$time_hour <-microbe_sum1_o$datetime
microbe_sum6_p$time_hour <-microbe_sum6_p$datetime
microbe_sum6_o$time_hour <-microbe_sum6_o$datetime
microbe_sum9_p$time_hour <-microbe_sum9_p$datetime
microbe_sum9_o$time_hour <-microbe_sum9_o$datetime
microbe_sum10_p$time_hour <-microbe_sum10_p$datetime
microbe_sum10_o$time_hour <-microbe_sum10_o$datetime

water_activity1p<-merge(x = microbe_sum1_p, y = ZRA_1, by=c("time_hour"))

```
#e- short year
```{r}
# only TEA data, not trimmed to match ZRA data presence. but it does match same date range 9/22-12/22
TEAs <- water %>%
  left_join(oxygen %>% select(time_hour, O2_1, O2_6, O2_9, O2_10),by = "time_hour") %>%
  left_join(no3_1 %>% select(time_hour, ZNO3S1),by = "time_hour")%>%
  left_join(no3_6 %>% select(time_hour, ZNO3S6),by = "time_hour")%>%
  left_join(no3_9 %>% select(time_hour, ZNO3S9),by = "time_hour")%>%
   left_join(no3_10 %>% select(time_hour, ZNO3S10),by = "time_hour")


TEA_short <- TEAs %>%
  filter(
   time_hour >= as.POSIXct("2023-09-22 00:00:00") &
   time_hour <= as.POSIXct("2023-12-22 23:59:59"))


ggplot(complete1, aes(x = time_hour, y = O2_1)) +
  geom_point(size=1) +
  geom_jitter()+
  labs(y = expression(O[2]~"Concentration (g m-3)"), 
       title = "Layer 1- TEST") +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
       # axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

#write.csv(complete1, "C:/Erin/ecosys/Cove/complete1.csv")

# Pivot longer
oxygen_long <- TEA_short %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(O2_6, O2_9, O2_10),
               names_to = "O2_Depth",
               values_to = "O2_value")
oxygen_long <- oxygen_long %>%
  mutate(
    O2_Depth = recode(O2_Depth,
                   "O2_10"  = "Layer 10",
                   "O2_6"  = "Layer 6",
                   "O2_9"  = "Layer 9"),
    O2_Depth = factor(O2_Depth, levels = c("Layer 6", "Layer 9", "Layer 10")))

o2_all<-ggplot(oxygen_long, aes(x = time_hour, y = O2_value, color = O2_Depth)) +
  geom_line(size=1) +
  geom_jitter()+
  labs(
    y = expression(O[2]~""~"(" * g~m^-3 * ")"),
    color="Depth")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# Pivot longer
No3_long <- TEA_short %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ZNO3S1, ZNO3S6, ZNO3S9,ZNO3S10),
               names_to = "NO3_Depth",
               values_to = "NO3_value")
No3_long$NO3_Depth <-as.factor(No3_long$NO3_Depth )
levels(No3_long$NO3_Depth )

No3_long <- No3_long %>%
  mutate(
    NO3_Depth = recode(NO3_Depth,
                   "ZNO3S1"  = "Layer 1",
                   "ZNO3S6"  = "Layer 6",
                   "ZNO3S9"  = "Layer 9",
                   "ZNO3S10" = "Layer 10"),
    NO3_Depth = factor(NO3_Depth, levels = c("Layer 1", "Layer 6", "Layer 9", "Layer 10")))

NO3_all<-ggplot(No3_long, aes(x = time_hour, y = NO3_value, color = NO3_Depth)) +
  geom_line(size=1) +
  #geom_jitter()+
  labs(y = expression(N~""~"(" * mg~L^-1 * ")"),
       color= "Depth") +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position= "right")

oxygen_1b <- ggplot(microbe_long1, aes(x = time_hour, y = O2_1)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(#title="2023 Oxygen Concentration | Soil-water interface", 
       y = expression(O[2]~Concentration~(g~m^{-3})))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

oxygen_6b <- ggplot(microbe_long6, aes(x = time_hour, y = O2_6)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="2023 Oxygen Concentration | 0.08 m", 
       y = expression(O[2]~Concentration~(g~m^{-3})))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

oxygen_9b <- ggplot(microbe_long9, aes(x = time_hour, y = O2_9)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="2023 Oxygen Concentration | 0.15 m", 
       y = expression(O[2]~Concentration~(g~m^{-3})))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

oxygen_10b <- ggplot(microbe_long10, aes(x = time_hour, y = O2_10)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="2023 Oxygen Concentration | 0.2 m", 
       y = expression(O[2]~Concentration~(g~m^{-3})))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

water_short<-plot(microbe_long6$time_hour, microbe_long6$V3)

water_short <- ggplot(TEA_short, aes(x = time_hour, y = V3, fill = V3)) +
  geom_line(size=1) +
  labs(y=" Water level (m)")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        #plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 1, l = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

line_final_D2<-ggarrange(water_short, line1,line6,line9,line10, nrow=5,ncol=1, align="hv", labels="AUTO", common.legend=TRUE, legend="right") #updated Figure 7 with water plot


ggarrange(oxygen_1b,NO3_all, ncol=1, nrow=2,align="hv", labels= "AUTO") #appendix H
#Plot 6
#ggarrange(water_short, NO3_all, nrow=2, align = "hv",heights = c(0.5, 0.5), common.legend = FALSE)

#DIFFERENCE PLOTS with e acceptors!!
#ggarrange(ZRAplot1,ZRAplot6,ZRAplot9,ZRAplot10, nrow=2, common.legend=TRUE)

#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_1b,ZRAplot1, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)

#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_6b,ZRAplot6, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)

#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_9b,ZRAplot9, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)

#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_10b,ZRAplot10, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)

```

#soil thickness plot
```{r}
depths <- data.frame(
  Layer = 1:17,
  Depth_m = c(.01,.02,.04,.05,.07,.08,.10,.14,.15,.20,.29,.43,.63,.93,1.33,1.93,2.84))
depths$Thickness <- c(depths$Depth_m[1], diff(depths$Depth_m))

ggplot(depths, aes(ymin = Depth_m - Thickness, ymax = Depth_m,
                   xmin = 0, xmax = 1)) +
  geom_rect(color = "black", fill = "tan") +
  scale_y_reverse() +   # Soil profiles go downward
  coord_fixed() +       # Keep proportional shape
  labs( y = "Depth (m)")+
      # title = "Modeled Soil Layer Profile") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank( ))

depths_s <- data.frame(
  Layer = 1:10,
  Depth_m = c(.01,.02,.04,.05,.07,.08,.10,.14,.15,.20))

depths_s$Thickness <- c(depths_s$Depth_m[1], diff(depths_s$Depth_m))

ggplot(depths_s, aes(ymin = Depth_m - Thickness, ymax = Depth_m,
                   xmin = 0, xmax = 1)) +
  geom_rect(color = "black", fill = "tan") +
  scale_y_reverse() +   # Soil profiles go downward
  #coord_fixed() +       # Keep proportional shape
  labs( y = "Depth (m)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank( ),
        axis.title.y=element_blank())
```
#temp vs ZRA
```{r}
library(stringr)
w2023<-read.csv("2023_w.csv", header = TRUE)
w2023<- w2023  [-c(1:3),-c(8:12)]

str(w2023)
w2023$SJ0405MXDHTHWPR <-as.numeric(w2023$SJ0405MXDHTHWPR)
w2023 <- w2023 %>%
  mutate(
    hour_chr = str_pad(.[[4]], width = 4, pad = "0"),
    time_hour = if_else(
      hour_chr == "2400",
      make_datetime(.[[2]], .[[1]], .[[3]], 0, 0) + days(1),
      make_datetime(
        .[[2]],
        .[[1]],
        .[[3]],
        as.integer(substr(hour_chr, 1, 2)),
        as.integer(substr(hour_chr, 3, 4))))) %>%
  select(-hour_chr)

temp_zra<-merge(x = w2023, y = ZRA_df, by=c("time_hour"))
temp_plot <- temp_zra %>%
  filter(pair %in% c("2 to 4", "2 to 78.2", "2 to 154.4", "2 to 228.6")) %>%
  mutate(
    pair = factor(
      pair,
      levels = c("2 to 4", "2 to 78.2", "2 to 154.4", "2 to 228.6"),
      labels = c("Layer 1", "Layer 6", "Layer 9", "Layer 10")))

temp_plot1<-temp_plot%>%
  filter(pair=="Layer 1")
temp_plot6<-temp_plot%>%
  filter(pair=="Layer 6")
temp_plot9<-temp_plot%>%
  filter(pair=="Layer 9")
temp_plot10<-temp_plot%>%
  filter(pair=="Layer 10")

na_temp <- lm(potential ~ X.3, data = temp_plot9)
coef(na_temp)[2]  # slope
coef(na_temp)[1]  # intercept
summary(na_temp)$r.squared
summary(na_temp)

library(broom)

r2_df <- temp_plot %>%
  group_by(pair) %>%
  do(
    glance(lm(potential ~ X.3, data = .))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    label = paste0("R² = ", round(r.squared, 2)))

r2_df2 <- r2_df %>%
  mutate(
    x_pos = max(temp_plot$X.3, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_pos = max(temp_plot$potential, na.rm = TRUE) -
            seq(0, by = diff(range(temp_plot$potential)) * 0.08, length.out = n())
  )

#dev.off()      # closes the current graphics device
#graphics.off() # closes *all* open graphics devices
ggplot(temp_plot, aes(x = X.3, y = potential, color = pair)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
 geom_text(
  data = r2_df2,
  aes(x = x_pos, y = y_pos, label = label, color = pair),
  hjust = 1,
  show.legend = FALSE)+
  labs(
    x = "Temperature (C)",
    y = "ZRA Current (nA)",
    color = "Depth") +
  theme_classic()
```

#________________
#UNUSED
##limited full year
```{r}
break
Soil1_open_L<-lim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="1" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil1_open_L$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil1_open_L$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil1_open_L$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil1_open_L$HOUR - 1)

df1_long_L <- Soil1_open_L %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

L1<-ggplot(df1_long_L, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = " 0.01 m (TEA-Stressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


# SOIL LAYER 6___________________________________________
Soil6_open_L<-lim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="6" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil6_open_L$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil6_open_L$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil6_open_L$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil6_open_L$HOUR - 1)

df6_long_L <- Soil6_open_L %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

L6<-ggplot(df6_long_L, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = "0.08 m (TEA-Stressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


# SOIL LAYER 9___________________________________________
Soil9_open_L<-lim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="9" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil9_open_L$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil9_open_L$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil9_open_L$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil9_open_L$HOUR - 1)

df9_long_L <- Soil9_open_L %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

L9<-ggplot(df9_long_L, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = "0.15 m (TEA-Stressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


# SOIL LAYER 10
Soil10_open_L<-lim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="10" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil10_open_L$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil10_open_L$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil10_open_L$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil10_open_L$HOUR - 1)

df10_long_L <- Soil10_open_L %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

L10<-ggplot(df10_long_L, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = "0.2 m (TEA-Stressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
     axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

#ggarrange(L1,L6,L9,L10, common.legend = TRUE)

```
##unlimited +ZRA
```{r}
#UNLIMITED merging!
unlimited_merge1<-merge(x = Soil1_open_U, y = ZRA_1, by=c("time_hour"))
unlimited_merge6<-merge(x = Soil6_open_U, y = ZRA_6, by=c("time_hour"))
unlimited_merge9<-merge(x = Soil9_open_U, y = ZRA_9, by=c("time_hour"))
unlimited_merge10<-merge(x = Soil10_open_U, y = ZRA_10, by=c("time_hour"))

 #Convert to long format for stacked area
unlimited_merge1_long <- unlimited_merge1 %>%
  select(time_hour, potential, 7:17) %>%   # cols 7-17 are microbes
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:13, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

unlimited_merge6_long <- unlimited_merge6 %>%
  select(time_hour, potential, 7:17) %>%   # cols 7-17 are microbes
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:13, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

unlimited_merge9_long <- unlimited_merge9 %>%
  select(time_hour, potential, 7:17) %>%   # cols 7-17 are microbes
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:13, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

unlimited_merge10_long <- unlimited_merge10 %>%
  select(time_hour, potential, 7:17) %>%   # cols 7-17 are microbes
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:13, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

# Plot
# find ranges
range_microbe <- range(unlimited_merge6_long$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
range_potential <- range(unlimited_merge6_long$potential, na.rm = TRUE)

scale_factor <- diff(range_microbe) / diff(range_potential)

Unlim_ZRA1 <-ggplot(unlimited_merge1_long, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = unlimited_merge1_long, 
             aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = potential * scale_factor, color = "Potential"),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil/ hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~./scale_factor, name = "Electrode Potential")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ACEFEM" = "lightgreen",
                               "ACEMET" = "khaki",
                               "ACEN2"  = "lightblue",
                               "CH4OX"  = "plum",
                               "FAC_AN" = "orange",
                               "FUNGI"  = "tan",
                               "H2MET"  = "pink",
                               "N2FIX"  = "red",
                               "NH3OX"  = "violet",
                               "NO2OX"  = "darkgreen",
                               "OB_AERO"= "yellow")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Potential" = "black")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title= "Unlimited/Unstressed", x = "Date", y = "Microbial activity",
       fill = "Microbe", color = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


Unlim_ZRA6<-ggplot(unlimited_merge6_long, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = unlimited_merge6_long, 
             aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = potential * scale_factor, color = "Potential"),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil/ hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~./scale_factor, name = "Electrode Potential")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ACEFEM" = "lightgreen",
                               "ACEMET" = "khaki",
                               "ACEN2"  = "lightblue",
                               "CH4OX"  = "plum",
                               "FAC_AN" = "orange",
                               "FUNGI"  = "tan",
                               "H2MET"  = "pink",
                               "N2FIX"  = "red",
                               "NH3OX"  = "violet",
                               "NO2OX"  = "darkgreen",
                               "OB_AERO"= "yellow")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Potential" = "black")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title= "Unlimited/Unstressed",x = "Date", y = "Microbial activity",
       fill = "Microbe", color = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


Unlim_ZRA9<-ggplot(unlimited_merge9_long, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = unlimited_merge9_long, 
             aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = potential * scale_factor, color = "Potential"),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil / h",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~./scale_factor, name = "Electrode Potential")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ACEFEM" = "lightgreen",
                               "ACEMET" = "khaki",
                               "ACEN2"  = "lightblue",
                               "CH4OX"  = "plum",
                               "FAC_AN" = "orange",
                               "FUNGI"  = "tan",
                               "H2MET"  = "pink",
                               "N2FIX"  = "red",
                               "NH3OX"  = "violet",
                               "NO2OX"  = "darkgreen",
                               "OB_AERO"= "yellow")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Potential" = "black")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title= "Unlimited/Unstressed",x = "Date", y = "Microbial activity",
       fill = "Microbe", color = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


Unlim_ZRA10<-ggplot(unlimited_merge10_long, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = unlimited_merge10_long, 
             aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = potential * scale_factor, color = "Potential"),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil/ hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~./scale_factor, name = "Electrode Potential")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ACEFEM" = "lightgreen",
                               "ACEMET" = "khaki",
                               "ACEN2"  = "lightblue",
                               "CH4OX"  = "plum",
                               "FAC_AN" = "orange",
                               "FUNGI"  = "tan",
                               "H2MET"  = "pink",
                               "N2FIX"  = "red",
                               "NH3OX"  = "violet",
                               "NO2OX"  = "darkgreen",
                               "OB_AERO"= "yellow")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Potential" = "black")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title= "Unlimited/Unstressed",x = "Date", y = "Microbial activity",
       fill = "Microbe", color = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


ggarrange(Unlim_ZRA1,Unlim_ZRA6,Unlim_ZRA9,Unlim_ZRA10, nrow=2, common.legend=TRUE)
#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_1b,Unlim_ZRA1, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)
#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_6b,Unlim_ZRA6, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)
#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_9b,Unlim_ZRA9, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)
#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_10b,Unlim_ZRA10, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)


```
###Line graphs
```{r}
# Collapse microbes into a single summed column
microbe_sum_U <- unlimited_merge1_long %>%
  group_by(time_hour) %>%
  summarise(Microbe_total = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
            potential = first(potential)) %>%
  ungroup()

microbe_sum_U6 <- unlimited_merge6_long %>%
  group_by(time_hour) %>%
  summarise(Microbe_total = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
            potential = first(potential)) %>%
  ungroup()

microbe_sum_U9 <- unlimited_merge9_long %>%
  group_by(time_hour) %>%
  summarise(Microbe_total = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
            potential = first(potential)) %>%
  ungroup()

microbe_sum_U10 <- unlimited_merge10_long %>%
  group_by(time_hour) %>%
  summarise(Microbe_total = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
            potential = first(potential)) %>%
  ungroup()

scale_factor_U <- max(microbe_sum_U$Microbe_total, na.rm = TRUE) /max(microbe_sum_U$potential, na.rm = TRUE)

scale_factor_U6 <- max(microbe_sum_U6$Microbe_total, na.rm = TRUE) /max(microbe_sum_U6$potential, na.rm = TRUE)

scale_factor_U9 <- max(microbe_sum_U9$Microbe_total, na.rm = TRUE) /max(microbe_sum_U9$potential, na.rm = TRUE)

scale_factor_U10 <- max(microbe_sum_U10$Microbe_total, na.rm = TRUE) /max(microbe_sum_U10$potential, na.rm = TRUE)

line_U1<- ggplot(microbe_sum_U, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour))) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Microbe_total), color = "red", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = potential * scale_factor_U), color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil / hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor_U, name = "Electrode Potential")) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "model soil depth=0.01 m; electrode = 2 to 4") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.left =  element_text(color = "red"),
    axis.text.y.left  = element_text(color = "red"),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_line(color = "red"))+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


line_U6<- ggplot(microbe_sum_U6, aes(x =as.POSIXct(time_hour)))+
  geom_line(aes(y = Microbe_total), color = "red", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = potential * scale_factor_U6), color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil / hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor_U6, name = "Electrode Potential")) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "model soil depth=0.08 m; electrode = 2 to 78.2") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
    #axis.title.y.left =  element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "red"),
    axis.text.y.left  = element_text(color = "red"),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_line(color = "red"),
    axis.title.y.right=element_blank())

line_U9<- ggplot(microbe_sum_U9, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour))) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Microbe_total), color = "red", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = potential * scale_factor_U9), color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil / hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor_U9, name = "Electrode Potential")) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "model soil depth=0.15 m; electrode = 2 to 154.4") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.left =  element_text(color = "red"),
    axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.left  = element_text(color = "red"),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_line(color = "red"))

line_U10<- ggplot(microbe_sum_U10, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour))) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Microbe_total), color = "red", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = potential * scale_factor_U10), color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil / hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor_U10, name = "Electrode Potential"))+
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "model soil depth=0.2 m; electrode = 2 to 228.6") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    #axis.text.x = element_blank(),
   axis.title.y = element_text(color = "red"),
    axis.text.y.left  = element_text(color = "red"),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_line(color = "red"),
    axis.title.y.right = element_blank())

line_final_U<-ggarrange(line_U1,line_U6,line_U9,line_U10, nrow=4,ncol=1, align="hv")
line_final_Ub<- annotate_figure(line_final_U,
                               top = text_grob("Unlimited/Unstressed | model vs ZRA",
                               color = "black", face = "bold", size = 16))

ggarrange(line_final_U,line_final_D, align = "hv")
```
##limited +ZRA
```{r}
#UNLIMITED merging!
limited_merge1<-merge(x = Soil1_open_L, y = ZRA_1, by=c("time_hour"))
limited_merge6<-merge(x = Soil6_open_L, y = ZRA_6, by=c("time_hour"))
limited_merge9<-merge(x = Soil9_open_L, y = ZRA_9, by=c("time_hour"))
limited_merge10<-merge(x = Soil10_open_L, y = ZRA_10, by=c("time_hour"))

 #Convert to long format for stacked area
limited_merge1_long <- limited_merge1 %>%
  select(time_hour, potential, 7:17) %>%   # cols 7-17 are microbes
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:13, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

limited_merge6_long <- limited_merge6 %>%
  select(time_hour, potential, 7:17) %>%   # cols 7-17 are microbes
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:13, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

limited_merge9_long <- limited_merge9 %>%
  select(time_hour, potential, 7:17) %>%   # cols 7-17 are microbes
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:13, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

limited_merge10_long <- limited_merge10 %>%
  select(time_hour, potential, 7:17) %>%   # cols 7-17 are microbes
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:13, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

# Plot
# find ranges
range_microbe <- range(limited_merge6_long$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
range_potential <- range(limited_merge6_long$potential, na.rm = TRUE)

scale_factor <- diff(range_microbe) / diff(range_potential)

lim_ZRA1 <-ggplot(limited_merge1_long, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = limited_merge1_long, 
             aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = potential * scale_factor, color = "Potential"),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil/ hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~./scale_factor, name = "Electrode Potential")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ACEFEM" = "lightgreen",
                               "ACEMET" = "khaki",
                               "ACEN2"  = "lightblue",
                               "CH4OX"  = "plum",
                               "FAC_AN" = "orange",
                               "FUNGI"  = "tan",
                               "H2MET"  = "pink",
                               "N2FIX"  = "red",
                               "NH3OX"  = "violet",
                               "NO2OX"  = "darkgreen",
                               "OB_AERO"= "yellow")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Potential" = "black")) +
  theme_minimal() +
```
