```{r}
  labs(title= "Limited/Stressed",x = "Date", y = "Microbial activity",
       fill = "Microbe", color = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


lim_ZRA6<-ggplot(limited_merge6_long, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = limited_merge6_long, 
             aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = potential * scale_factor, color = "Potential"),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil/ hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~./scale_factor, name = "Electrode Potential")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ACEFEM" = "lightgreen",
                               "ACEMET" = "khaki",
                               "ACEN2"  = "lightblue",
                               "CH4OX"  = "plum",
                               "FAC_AN" = "orange",
                               "FUNGI"  = "tan",
                               "H2MET"  = "pink",
                               "N2FIX"  = "red",
                               "NH3OX"  = "violet",
                               "NO2OX"  = "darkgreen",
                               "OB_AERO"= "yellow")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Potential" = "black")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title= "Limited/Stressed",x = "Date", y = "Microbial activity",
       fill = "Microbe", color = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


lim_ZRA9<-ggplot(limited_merge9_long, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = limited_merge9_long, 
             aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = potential * scale_factor, color = "Potential"),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil / h",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~./scale_factor, name = "Electrode Potential")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ACEFEM" = "lightgreen",
                               "ACEMET" = "khaki",
                               "ACEN2"  = "lightblue",
                               "CH4OX"  = "plum",
                               "FAC_AN" = "orange",
                               "FUNGI"  = "tan",
                               "H2MET"  = "pink",
                               "N2FIX"  = "red",
                               "NH3OX"  = "violet",
                               "NO2OX"  = "darkgreen",
                               "OB_AERO"= "yellow")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Potential" = "black")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title= "Limited/Stressed",x = "Date", y = "Microbial activity",
       fill = "Microbe", color = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


lim_ZRA10<-ggplot(limited_merge10_long, aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = limited_merge10_long, 
             aes(x = as.POSIXct(time_hour), y = potential * scale_factor, color = "Potential"),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "g C Soil/ hour",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~./scale_factor, name = "Electrode Potential")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ACEFEM" = "lightgreen",
                               "ACEMET" = "khaki",
                               "ACEN2"  = "lightblue",
                               "CH4OX"  = "plum",
                               "FAC_AN" = "orange",
                               "FUNGI"  = "tan",
                               "H2MET"  = "pink",
                               "N2FIX"  = "red",
                               "NH3OX"  = "violet",
                               "NO2OX"  = "darkgreen",
                               "OB_AERO"= "yellow")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Potential" = "black")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title= "Limited/Stressed",x = "Date", y = "Microbial activity",
       fill = "Microbe", color = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


#ggarrange(lim_ZRA1,lim_ZRA6,lim_ZRA9,lim_ZRA10, nrow=2, ncol=2, common.legend=TRUE)
#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_1b,lim_ZRA1, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)
#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_6b,lim_ZRA6, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)
#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_9b,lim_ZRA9, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)
#ggarrange(water_short,oxygen_10b,lim_ZRA10, nrow=3, common.legend=FALSE)

```

#ensemble
```{r}

plot10<-ggarrange(Unlim_ZRA10,lim_ZRA10,ZRAplot10, nrow=3, common.legend = TRUE)
plot9<-ggarrange(Unlim_ZRA9,lim_ZRA9,ZRAplot9, nrow=3, common.legend = TRUE)
plot6<-ggarrange(Unlim_ZRA6,lim_ZRA6,ZRAplot6, nrow=3, common.legend = TRUE)
plot1<-ggarrange(Unlim_ZRA1,lim_ZRA1,ZRAplot1, nrow=3, common.legend = TRUE)

final10 <- annotate_figure(plot10,
                top = text_grob("2 m | electrode 2 to 228",
                               color = "black", face = "bold", size = 16))
final9 <- annotate_figure(plot9,
                top = text_grob("0.15 m | electrode 2 to 145",
                               color = "black", face = "bold", size = 16))
final6 <- annotate_figure(plot6,
                top = text_grob("0.08 m | electrode 2 to 78",
                               color = "black", face = "bold", size = 16))
final1<- annotate_figure(plot1,
                  top = text_grob("0.01 m | electrode 2 to 4",
                               color = "black", face = "bold", size = 16))

```
#dn
```{r}
no3_dn <- read.delim("030102023dn", header=TRUE, sep= "")
no3_hn <- read.delim("020102023hn", header=TRUE, sep= "")
no3_dn$DATE <-as.numeric(no3_dn$DATE)
no3_dn$DATE <- dmy(no3_dn$DATE)
no3_hn$DATE <-as.numeric(no3_hn$DATE)
no3_hn$DATE <- dmy(no3_hn$DATE)
plot(no3_dn$NO3)
# Pivot longer
no3_dn_long <- no3_dn %>%
  select(DOY, DATE, NO3_1, NO3_6, NO3_9,NO3_10)%>%
    group_by(DATE)%>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(NO3_1, NO3_6, NO3_9,NO3_10),
               names_to = "NO3_Depth",
               values_to = "NO3_value")

ggplot(no3_dn_long, aes(x = DATE, y = NO3_value, color = NO3_Depth)) +
  geom_line(size=1) +
  geom_jitter()+
  labs(
    y = expression(NO[3]~""~"(" * gN~m^-2 * ")"),
    color="Depth")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        #axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
```
#VEG PLOTS
##unlimited
```{r}
break #skip this section
# Don't use these if you don't need them
Soil1_open_U<-unlim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="1" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET),
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil1_open_U$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil1_open_U$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil1_open_U$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil1_open_U$HOUR - 1)

Soil1_open_U2 <- Soil1_open_U %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, time_hour)
df1_long_U <- Soil1_open_U %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")
df1_long_U2 <- Soil1_open_U2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

U1<-ggplot(df1_long_U, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
 # ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.01 m (TEA-unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) +
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
    scale_fill_discrete(
  name = "Microbe")


# SOIL LAYER 6___________________________________________
Soil6_open_U<-unlim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="6" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET),
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil6_open_U$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil6_open_U$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil6_open_U$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil6_open_U$HOUR - 1)

Soil6_open_U2 <- Soil6_open_U %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, time_hour)

df6_long_U <- Soil6_open_U %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df6_long_U2 <- Soil6_open_U2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

U6<-ggplot(df6_long_U, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
   # ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.08 m (TEA-unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #legend.position = "bottom",
    #legend.box = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank())
  #  axis.title.y= element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


# SOIL LAYER 9___________________________________________
Soil9_open_U<-unlim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="9" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil9_open_U$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil9_open_U$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil6_open_U$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil9_open_U$HOUR - 1)
Soil9_open_U2 <- Soil9_open_U %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, time_hour)

df9_long_U <- Soil9_open_U %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df9_long_U2 <- Soil9_open_U2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

U9<-ggplot(df9_long_U, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
   # ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.15 m (TEA-unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
   # legend.position = "bottom",
  #  legend.box = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank())
 # guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

# SOIL LAYER 10
U10<-Soil10_open_U<-unlim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="10" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil10_open_U$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil10_open_U$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil10_open_U$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil10_open_U$HOUR - 1)

Soil10_open_U2 <- Soil10_open_U %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, time_hour)

df10_long_U <- Soil10_open_U %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df10_long_U2 <- Soil10_open_U2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

U10<-ggplot(df10_long_U, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.2 m (TEA-unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
 theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

U10b<-ggplot(df10_long_U, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = "0.2 m (TEA-Unstressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
 theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme(
   # legend.position = "bottom",
  #  legend.box = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x=element_blank()) 
#  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

ggarrange(U1,U6,U9,U10, common.legend = TRUE)
```
##limited
```{r}
Soil1_open_L<-lim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="1" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil1_open_L$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil1_open_L$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil1_open_L$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil1_open_L$HOUR - 1)

df1_long_L <- Soil1_open_L %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

L1<-ggplot(df1_long_L, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = " 0.01 m (TEA-Stressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


# SOIL LAYER 6___________________________________________
Soil6_open_L<-lim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="6" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil6_open_L$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil6_open_L$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil6_open_L$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil6_open_L$HOUR - 1)

df6_long_L <- Soil6_open_L %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

L6<-ggplot(df6_long_L, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = "0.08 m (TEA-Stressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


# SOIL LAYER 9___________________________________________
Soil9_open_L<-lim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="9" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil9_open_L$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil9_open_L$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil9_open_L$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil9_open_L$HOUR - 1)

df9_long_L <- Soil9_open_L %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

L9<-ggplot(df9_long_L, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = "0.15 m (TEA-Stressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))


# SOIL LAYER 10
Soil10_open_L<-lim4 %>%
  filter(Soil=="10" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil10_open_L$time_hour <- as.Date(Soil10_open_L$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil10_open_L$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil10_open_L$HOUR - 1)

df10_long_L <- Soil10_open_L %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

L10<-ggplot(df10_long_L, aes(x = time_hour, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  labs(title = "0.2 m (TEA-Stressed)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
     axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank()) 
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

#ggarrange(L1,L6,L9,L10, common.legend = TRUE)

```
##difference
```{r}
Soil1_open_D<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="1" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil1_open_D$datetime <- as.Date(Soil1_open_D$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil1_open_D$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil1_open_D$HOUR - 1)
Soil1_open_D2 <- Soil1_open_D %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, datetime)

df1_long_D2 <- Soil1_open_D2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

D1<-ggplot(df1_long_D, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
   # ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.01 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
 theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank()) 

# SOIL LAYER 6___________________________________________
Soil6_open_D<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="6" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil6_open_D$datetime <- as.Date(Soil6_open_D$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil6_open_D$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil6_open_D$HOUR - 1)

Soil6_open_D2 <- Soil6_open_D %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, datetime)

df6_long_D <- Soil6_open_D %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df6_long_D2 <- Soil6_open_D2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

D6<-ggplot(df6_long_D, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
   # ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.08 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
   theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #legend.position = "bottom",
    #legend.box = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x=element_blank(), 
    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank()) 

# SOIL LAYER 9___________________________________________
Soil9_open_D<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="9" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil9_open_D$datetime <- as.Date(Soil9_open_D$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil9_open_D$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil9_open_D$HOUR - 1)

Soil9_open_D2 <- Soil9_open_D %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, datetime)

df9_long_D <- Soil9_open_D %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df9_long_D2 <- Soil9_open_D2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

D9<-ggplot(df9_long_D, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
#  ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.15 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank())

  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
# SOIL LAYER 10
Soil10_open_D<-microbes %>%
  filter(Soil=="10" & GridCell=="2")%>%
  group_by(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil)%>% 
  summarise(across(c(OB_AERO, FAC_AN, FUNGI, N2FIX,NH3OX, 
                     NO2OX, CH4OX, ACEN2, ACEFEM, ACEMET, H2MET ), 
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()
 # summarize(sum_Unlimited= sum(SUM))
Soil10_open_D$datetime <- as.Date(Soil10_open_D$DOY - 1, origin = paste0(Soil10_open_D$Year, "-01-01")) + hours(Soil10_open_D$HOUR - 1)

Soil10_open_D2 <- Soil10_open_D %>% 
  select(Year, DOY, HOUR, GridCell, Soil, CH4OX,ACEMET,H2MET, datetime)

df10_long_D <- Soil10_open_D %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:16, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

df10_long_D2 <- Soil10_open_D2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 6:8, names_to = "Microbe", values_to = "Value")

D10<-ggplot(df10_long_D2, aes(x = datetime, y = Value, fill = Microbe)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.POSIXct("2023-09-22"), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  #ylim(0,0.45)+
  labs(title = "0.2 m (Unmet TEA Demand)",
       x = "Time", y = "g C soil/ h") +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,family = "serif"),
    #egend.position = "bottom",
    #legebox = "horizontal",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    #axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y= element_blank())

```
##PLOT
```{r}
make_df <- function(df, level) {
  df %>%
    mutate(Level = level,
           Type = ifelse(GridCell == 2, "Plant", "Open")) %>%
    filter(Type %in% c("Plant", "Open"))}

plot_df <- bind_rows(
  make_df(microbe_sum1,  "1"),
  make_df(microbe_sum6,  "6"),
  make_df(microbe_sum9,  "9"),
  make_df(microbe_sum10, "10")
)

# Compute metrics
metrics <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(Level, Type) %>%
  summarise(
    fit = list(lm(potential ~ total_microbes, data = cur_data())),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    R2   = summary(fit)$r.squared,
    RMSE = rmse(plot_df$potential[plot_df$Level == Level & plot_df$Type == Type],
                predict(fit)),
    label = paste0("R² = ", round(R2, 2), "\nRMSE = ", signif(RMSE, 2)),
    label_color = ifelse(Type == "Plant", "forestgreen", "darkorange")
  )

# Compute dynamic y positions per Level
y_ranges <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(Level) %>%
  summarise(
    max_val = max(potential, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_val = min(potential, na.rm = TRUE),
    range_val = max_val - min_val,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

metrics <- metrics %>%
  left_join(y_ranges, by = "Level") %>%
  mutate(
      y_pos = ifelse(
      Type == "Plant",
      max_val - 0.1 * range_val,  # 10% below max for Plant
      max_val - 0.5 * range_val # 30% below max for Open
      ))
metrics <- metrics %>%
  mutate(
    Level = factor(Level, levels = c("1", "6", "9", "10"))
  )

level_labels <- c(
  "1"  = "Layer 1 (0.01 m)",
  "6"  = "Layer 6 (0.08 m)",
  "9"  = "Layer 9 (0.15 m)",
  "10" = "Layer 10 (0.2 m)")
#level_labels <-as.factor(level_labels)

plot_df$Level<-factor(plot_df$Level, levels = c("1", "6", "9", "10"))

stacked<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = total_microbes, y = potential, color = Type)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ Level, ncol=1, scales = "free")+#, labeller = labeller(Level = level_labels)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Plant" = "forestgreen", "Open" = "darkorange")) +

  # R² and RMSE labels colored by Type
  geom_text(
    data = metrics,
    aes(x = -Inf, y = y_pos, label = label),
    color = metrics$label_color,  # literal color
    hjust = -0.05,
    size = 3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Modeled microbial activity (g C/hour)",
    y = "Observed current (nA)",
    color = "Grid cell",
   # title = "Plant vs Open relationships between modeled microbial potential and measured current"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14, family = "serif"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
#ggarrange(line_final_D, stacked, ncol=2, common.legend = TRUE )

legend <- get_legend(line_final_D + theme(legend.position = "top"))

ggarrange(
  line_final_D + theme(legend.position = "none"),
  g_plot + theme(legend.position = "none"),
  legend,
  ncol = 2
 # heights = c(1,1,0.2)
)


```
##Fig 7- PLOT2
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
library(gtable)
library(ggpubr)
library(dplyr)
library(Metrics)  # for rmse()

# ----------------------------
# Helper function to make one panel
# ----------------------------
make_panel <- function(df, metrics_df, level, show_x = FALSE) {
  
  ggplot(
    df %>% filter(Level == level),
    aes(x = total_microbes, y = potential, color = Type)
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
    
    # Plant/Open R² & RMSE labels
    geom_text(
      data = metrics_df %>% filter(Level == level),
      aes(x = -Inf, y = y_pos, label = label),
      color = metrics_df$label_color[metrics_df$Level == level],
      hjust = -0.05,
      size = 12 / .pt,   # 12 pt
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Plant" = "forestgreen", "Open" = "darkorange")) +
    scale_y_continuous(position = "right") +
    
    labs(
      x = if (show_x) "Modeled microbial activity (g C/hour)" else NULL,
      y = NULL
    ) +
    
    theme_bw(base_size = 12, base_family = "Times New Roman") +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.title.x = if (show_x) element_text() else element_blank(),
      axis.text.x  = if (show_x) element_text() else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = if (show_x) element_line() else element_blank()
    )
}

# ----------------------------
# Make metrics dataframe for R² and RMSE
# ----------------------------
metrics <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(Level, Type) %>%
  do({
    fit <- lm(potential ~ total_microbes, data = .)
    tibble(
      R2   = summary(fit)$r.squared,
      RMSE = rmse(.$potential, predict(fit))
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    label = paste0("R² = ", round(R2, 3), "\nRMSE = ", signif(RMSE, 3)),
    label_color = ifelse(Type == "Plant", "forestgreen", "darkorange")
  )

# Compute dynamic y positions per Level to avoid overlap
y_ranges <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(Level) %>%
  summarise(
    max_val = max(potential, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_val = min(potential, na.rm = TRUE),
    range_val = max_val - min_val,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

metrics <- metrics %>%
  left_join(y_ranges, by = "Level") %>%
  mutate(
    y_pos = ifelse(
      Type == "Plant",
      max_val - 0.1 * range_val,
      max_val - 0.5 * range_val
    )
  )

# ----------------------------
# Build panels
# ----------------------------
p1 <- make_panel(plot_df, metrics, "1",  show_x = FALSE)
p2 <- make_panel(plot_df, metrics, "6",  show_x = FALSE)
p3 <- make_panel(plot_df, metrics, "9",  show_x = FALSE)
p4 <- make_panel(plot_df, metrics, "10", show_x = TRUE)

panels <- p1 / p2 / p3 / p4 +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

# ----------------------------
# Convert to grob
# ----------------------------
g <- patchwork::patchworkGrob(panels)

# ----------------------------
# Add panel letters outside
# ----------------------------
g <- gtable_add_cols(g, unit(1.2, "cm"), pos = 0)
g <- gtable_add_grob(
  g,
  grobs = textGrob(
    c("E", "F", "G", "H"),
    y = unit(c(0.96, 0.75, 0.5, 0.27), "npc"),  # move letters higher
    gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", fontfamily = "Times New Roman")
  ),
  t = 1, b = nrow(g), l = 1
)

# ----------------------------
# Add shared right-side Y label
# ----------------------------
g <- gtable_add_cols(g, unit(1.2, "cm"), pos = -1)
g <- gtable_add_grob(
  g,
  textGrob(
    "Observed current (nA)",
    rot = -90,
    gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontfamily = "Times New Roman")
  ),
  t = 1, b = nrow(g), l = ncol(g)
)

# Wrap gtable into ggplot object so ggarrange can see it
g_plot <- as_ggplot(g)

# ----------------------------
# Combine with line_final_D using ggarrange
# ----------------------------
final_figure <- ggarrange(
  line_final_D,
  g_plot,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(1, 1),
  align = "hv",
  common.legend = TRUE, legend="bottom"
)

# Display
final_figure


```
